title: Stan616's Modpack
description: A modpack if u want to have everything Stan616 is using
body:
This modpacks aims to **optimize** and creates the **almost perfect creative building experience** for it's users, The same way Stan616 does! Have fun, and build away <3


****
Links To socials :
- [https://www.twitch.tv/stan616](https://www.twitch.tv/stan616)
- [https://www.youtube.com/@stan616](https://www.youtube.com/@stan616)
- [https://www.tiktok.com/@stan616tt](https://www.tiktok.com/@stan616tt)
****
Contains: 

**- Mods -**

- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- Axiom
- Better Clouds
- Bookshelf Inspector
- Cloth Config API
- Distant Horizons
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Flashback
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- Model Gap Fix
- More Culling
- Ortho Camera
- Simple Fog Control
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Sound Controller
- Tweakeroo
- WI Zoom
- WorldEdit
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)

****
**- Shaders -**

- Bliss
- BSL 
- BSL Classic
- Complementary Reimagined
- Complementary Unbound
- Photon
- Rethinking Voxels
- Solas
****
**- Texture Packs -**

- Enchant Icons
- Krista's Better Walls
  ****

_This modpack was created by LyraDamn (Stan616's Moderator)
If you'd like to see more added, make sure to message me <3_
